content:
## Summary Notes

- Emerging Trends: The Role of Information Technology Technology is moving warehouses from simple storage facilities to highly efficient, "smart" fulfillment hubs.
- ● Warehouse Management Systems (WMS): Acts as the "brain" of the warehouse.
- Modern cloud-based WMS provide real-time data, enabling managers to track inventory, prioritize orders, and sync operations across multiple locations instantly.
- ● Artificial Intelligence (AI) & Machine Learning: Analyzes massive datasets to predict demand patterns, optimize storage "slotting" (where items are placed), and plan the most efficient picking routes to save time.
- ● The Internet of Things (IoT): Connects physical devices (like smart shelves and RFID tags) to the internet.

sources.title: UNIT 4.pdf
